label: Search leads… (input)
expected_behavior: On input, debounced kanbanFilterDebounced sets window._searchQuery and re-filters/highlights kanban cards by name, address, phone, or claim number.
notes: data-on-input=kanbanFilterDebounced

label: ✕ (clear search)
expected_behavior: clearCrmSearch empties the search input, removes nbd_crm_search from localStorage, nulls window._searchQuery, and re-runs kanbanFilter.
notes: data-fn=clearCrmSearch

label: All Types (damage-type filter select)
expected_behavior: On change, kanbanFilter restricts visible cards to the selected damage type (Roof-Hail, Roof-Wind, Siding, Gutters, Full Exterior, Fire, Water).
notes: data-on-change=kanbanFilter; 9 damage options

label: Ins (view tab)
expected_behavior: kanbanView switches the pipeline to the Insurance stage set, calls buildKanbanColumns('insurance'), persists nbd_kanban_view, and re-renders cards into that view's columns.
notes: Representative of 7-button view switcher; default-active. Repeats per view: cash/finance/warranty/service/jobs/simple (see 005).

label: Cash / Fin / War / Svc / Jobs / All (view tabs)
expected_behavior: kanbanView switches the pipeline to the corresponding KANBAN_VIEWS stage set (cash/finance/warranty/service/jobs/simple-All), rebuilds columns, and re-renders cards; each shows a per-view count badge.
notes: 6 sibling view tabs; 'simple' is the All view. Count spans #kview-count-*.

label: Toggle sidebar (icon)
expected_behavior: data-action=toggle target=sidebarCollapse collapses the left nav to an icon-only rail to gain horizontal room for the kanban.

label: Fullscreen kanban (icon)
expected_behavior: data-action=toggle target=kanbanFullscreen adds body.kanban-fullscreen to hide all chrome and let the board fill the viewport; Esc / #kanbanFullscreenExit exits.
notes: Exit affordance #kanbanFullscreenExit appears only in fullscreen.

label: Card density (icon)
expected_behavior: cycleKanbanDensity cycles card chrome density Compact → Comfortable → Spacious in place (sets :root[data-density]).

label: Tools (⋯ icon)
expected_behavior: crmToolsMenu action opens the .crm-tools-menu dropdown containing tool navigation + a mobile-only mirror of the inline filter cluster.

label: Estimates / Photos / Documents / Map / Drawing Tool / Schedule / Dashboard (tools menu items)
expected_behavior: toolMenuGoTo navigates to the named view (est/photos/docs/map/draw/schedule/dash) and closes the tools menu.
notes: 7 nav items; representative row. Off-surface destinations.

label: Mobile filter cluster (Needs Attention / Stale Shares / Prospects / Snoozed / Hot first / Bulk select / Export CSV)
expected_behavior: Mirrors the inline desktop filter buttons (same data-action/data-target) so the toggle dispatcher fires identically on phones where the inline buttons are hidden.
notes: Duplicates of 014/015/016/017/018/020/021; mobile-only display.

label: 🗑 (Deleted Leads)
expected_behavior: openDeletedDrawer slides in #deletedDrawer listing soft-deleted leads for restore or permanent removal; trash count badge reflects count.
notes: Opens drawer (see 050-051).

label: 🎲 Sample
expected_behavior: loadSampleData seeds 5 sample leads into the pipeline; button hidden by default, shown only when CRM is empty.
notes: display:none default; surfaced when no leads.

label: 🚨 Needs Attention
expected_behavior: toggle target=needsAttention filters kanban to leads with stale stage (>=7d), overdue tasks, or stale estimates; count badge shows match total.
notes: #needsAttentionCountBadge

label: 📤 Stale Shares
expected_behavior: toggle target=staleShares filters kanban to customers shared with 5+ days ago who haven't responded (W44 lastSharedAt tracking).
notes: #staleSharesCountBadge

label: 👀 Prospects
expected_behavior: data-action=goTo target=prospects navigates to the Prospects page (#/prospects); count badge shows pending-prospect total.
notes: #prospectsCountBadge

label: 💤 Snoozed
expected_behavior: toggle target=showSnoozed surfaces snoozed leads (hidden by default); count badge shows currently-snoozed total.
notes: #snoozedCountBadge

label: 🔥 Hot first
expected_behavior: toggle target=engagementSort reorders cards within each stage column descending by engagement tier (W91/W92) so Hot leads sit at the top.

label: ☑ Bulk
expected_behavior: toggle target=bulkMode enters multi-select mode: card checkboxes become active and #bulkActionBar reveals for batch operations.
notes: Reveals bulk action bar (see 023-035).

label: 📤 CSV
expected_behavior: exportLeadsCSV serializes the current (filtered) lead set to a CSV file and triggers a download.

label: 0 selected (counter)
expected_behavior: Read-only live counter showing number of selected leads in bulk mode; updates as cards are toggled.
notes: Display-only; included for completeness.

label: ☑ Select all visible
expected_behavior: selectAllVisibleLeads checks every currently-visible (filtered) kanban card and updates the selected count.

label: Move to stage… (select)
expected_behavior: Picks the destination stage for a bulk move; consumed by bulkMoveStage. Options populated dynamically with static fallback (new..closed,lost).

label: ▶ Move
expected_behavior: bulkMoveStage moves all selected leads to #bulkStageSelect value; routes each through moveCard() to preserve transactional history + lost-reason prompt.
notes: Moves to 'lost' will trigger lost-reason prompt; gate applies per-lead.

label: Set carrier… (select)
expected_behavior: Picks an insurance carrier (State Farm, Allstate, USAA, etc.) to apply in bulk; consumed by bulkAssignCarrier.
notes: 10 carrier options incl. Other.

label: ▶ Apply (carrier)
expected_behavior: bulkAssignCarrier writeBatch-sets insuranceCarrier on all selected leads (commitBulkLeadOp, atomic per 450-lead chunk).

label: Set damage… (select)
expected_behavior: Picks a damage type (Roof-Hail/Wind, Siding, Gutters, Other) to bulk-apply; consumed by bulkAssignDamage.

label: ▶ Apply (damage)
expected_behavior: bulkAssignDamage writeBatch-sets damageType on all selected leads.

label: Set source… (select)
expected_behavior: Picks a lead source (Door Knock, Referral, Web Lead, etc.) to bulk-apply; consumed by bulkAssignSource (preset value wins unless #bulkSourceCustom is filled).
notes: 9 preset sources.

label: …or type custom (source input)
expected_behavior: Free-text campaign/source tag (maxlength 60); read by bulkAssignSource to tag selected leads with a source not in the preset list.

label: ▶ Apply (source)
expected_behavior: bulkAssignSource writeBatch-sets source on all selected leads using the custom input if provided else the select value.

label: Set job type… (select)
expected_behavior: Picks job type (insurance/cash/finance) to bulk-apply; routes leads into the matching pipeline view filter. Consumed by bulkAssignJobType.

label: ▶ Apply (job type)
expected_behavior: bulkAssignJobType writeBatch-sets jobType on all selected leads.

label: 💤 Snooze...
expected_behavior: bulkSnoozeLeads opens LeadSnooze.bulkPrompt for preset/custom date, then writeBatch-commits snoozedUntil, patches cache, and auto-exits bulk mode.

label: 🗑 Delete (bulk)
expected_behavior: bulkDelete soft-deletes all selected leads via writeBatch (commitBulkLeadOp). Destructive — drive only to confirm boundary.
notes: DANGER: batch soft-delete.

label: ✕ Cancel (bulk)
expected_behavior: clearBulkSelection deselects all cards and exits bulk mode (hides #bulkActionBar).

label: ＋ (Add Lead FAB)
expected_behavior: openLeadModal opens the empty #leadModal in Add mode; auto-infers jobType from current view (insurance/cash/finance) and filters the stage dropdown accordingly. Keyboard shortcut C also fires it.
notes: body.show-add-lead-fab gates visibility; bottom-right FAB.

label: Kanban card (body)
expected_behavior: card-click handler handleCardClick(id) opens the card detail modal for that lead (unless a nbd-kc-stop child swallowed the click).
notes: Representative card; repeats per lead in every column. Card root also draggable=true (see 048).

label: Card select checkbox
expected_behavior: toggle-select calls toggleCardSelection(id), adding/removing the lead from the bulk-selection set and updating the selected count.
notes: Repeats per card; only meaningful in bulk mode.

label: Task badge / Add a task
expected_behavior: open-tasks calls openTaskModal(id, ev) to view existing tasks or add a new task for the lead; badge label shows task count.
notes: Repeats per card.

label: ◀ Move to previous stage
expected_behavior: move-card calls moveCard(id, prevStage): runs prospect-promote trap, lost-reason prompt (for lost), and the required-field gate before optimistically advancing the card backward one stage.
notes: Repeats per card; hidden (spacer) when no previous stage. Gate at moveCard:1514.

label: ▶ Move to next stage
expected_behavior: move-card calls moveCard(id, nextStage): same gate/prompt path, advancing the card forward one stage. Missing required fields open the lead modal with a gate banner instead of moving.
notes: Repeats per card; hidden (spacer) on terminal stages.

label: ⋮ More actions
expected_behavior: card-overflow opens KanbanContextMenu.open(id) anchored next to the button — the same View/Edit/Add Task/Move/Classify/Call/Copy/Maps/Portal/Snooze/Delete menu as right-click/long-press.
notes: Repeats per card. Opens context menu (see 053-064).

label: Phone link (tel:)
expected_behavior: tel: link dials the lead's phone; nbd-kc-stop prevents the click from opening the card behind it.
notes: Repeats per card; only when phone set.

label: Lead score badge (e.g. 72 ↑)
expected_behavior: Display-only score pill from NBDLeadScore.breakdown(); tooltip shows 'Lead score N/100 (tier). topReason'. No click handler — informational, with up/down trend arrow.
notes: Non-interactive chip (no data-action); recorded for inventory completeness. Repeats per card.

label: Card photo thumb
expected_behavior: Separate delegated listener: click opens openPhotoFor(leadId,'') (photo gallery). No data-action; matched by class.
notes: Inline thumbs currently removed from card face (T3.c); listener retained. Repeats per card when present.

label: Kanban column drop zone
expected_behavior: ondragover preventDefault + ondrop=drop(event, stageKey): drop() reads the dragged lead id and calls moveCard(dragId, stageKey) — same gate/prompt path as the arrows.
notes: Drag target; one per stage column. Pairs with draggable card (048).

label: Card drag handle (whole card)
expected_behavior: Card is draggable; dragstart carries the lead id, dropping on a column calls moveCard via the drop() handler. Drag and arrows share the moveCard gate.
notes: Repeats per card. Both drag and arrow paths go through moveCard — gate false-positive is the known failure mode.

label: Required-field gate banner (click-to-jump)
expected_behavior: When moveCard's gate blocks an advance, _openLeadModalWithMissingFieldsBanner opens the lead modal with a banner listing missing fields; clicking a [data-gate-jump] item scrolls/focuses that input.
notes: Conditional reveal — only after a gated move. The GATE itself is the high-priority test (kanban-move-gate-diagnosis memory).

label: ✕ (close deleted drawer)
expected_behavior: closeModal target=deletedDrawer slides the deleted-leads drawer shut.

label: Restore / Permanently delete (per deleted lead)
expected_behavior: Drawer body rows are populated by JS with Restore (un-deletes the lead back into the pipeline) and permanent-delete actions. Permanent delete is destructive.
notes: DANGER: permanent purge. Row buttons rendered dynamically; representative entry.

label: Dismiss (follow-ups due)
expected_behavior: hideFollowUpAlerts hides the collapsible Follow-ups Due banner above the board.
notes: Banner only shows when follow-ups are due.

label: 👁 View details
expected_behavior: openCardDetailModal(lead.id) opens the lead's detail modal.
notes: Context menu item; menu reached via ⋮ overflow, right-click, or long-press.

label: ✏️ Edit lead
expected_behavior: editLead(lead.id) opens #leadModal pre-filled in Edit mode (title 'Edit Lead', #lEditId set).
notes: Primary edit entry point. Opens lead modal (066-093).

label: ✓ Add task
expected_behavior: openTaskModal(lead.id, null) opens the task modal to add a task for the lead.

label: 🔀 Move to stage…
expected_behavior: Opens a submenu of all stages for the current view; selecting one calls moveCard (full gate/prompt path) without opening the edit form.
notes: Submenu; current stage marked '(current)'.

label: 🏷 Change classification…
expected_behavior: Opens a submenu to relabel the lead's job-type/track (buildTypeSubmenuItems) without opening the edit form.
notes: Submenu.

label: 📞 Call <phone>
expected_behavior: Sets window.location.href to tel:<digits> to dial the lead.
notes: Only when lead.phone present.

label: 📋 Copy phone / 📋 Copy address
expected_behavior: copyToClipboard(phone|address) writes to clipboard and toasts success/failure.
notes: Conditional on phone / address presence.

label: 🗺 Open in Maps
expected_behavior: window.open(mapsUrl(address)) opens the address in Apple/Google Maps in a new tab.
notes: Only when lead.address present.

label: 🔗 Copy portal link
expected_behavior: PortalLinkHelpers.copyForLead resolves/generates the customer portal link and copies it to clipboard.
notes: Available when PortalLinkHelpers loaded (always on dashboard).

label: 💬 Text portal link / 📧 Email portal link
expected_behavior: PortalLinkHelpers.smsForLead / emailForLead open a pre-filled SMS or email with the portal link to the customer.
notes: DANGER: send. Text only when phone set; Email only when email set. Drive to compose boundary only.

label: 🔍 Preview portal
expected_behavior: PortalLinkHelpers.previewForLead opens a preview of the customer portal for this lead.
notes: Always available.

label: 💤 Snooze lead… / ⏰ Unsnooze
expected_behavior: If not snoozed, LeadSnooze.prompt(id,name) opens the snooze date picker; if snoozed, promptUnsnooze(id) clears the snooze. Label reflects current state.
notes: State-aware label. Snooze is a P1 surface item.

label: 🗑 Delete lead
expected_behavior: deleteLead(lead.id) soft-deletes the lead (opens its own confirm — #deleteConfirm modal with confirmDeleteLead / cancelDeleteConfirm).
notes: DANGER: delete. Drive to confirm modal boundary only.

label: ✕ (close lead modal)
expected_behavior: closeModal target=leadModal closes the modal; closeLeadModal also clears all fields, resets title to 'Add Lead', and hides conditional field blocks.
notes: Two close affordances (floating ✕ + bar ✕). Backdrop click also closes.

label: Save (modal bar)
expected_behavior: saveLead validates name+address (required), validates email/phone, runs LeadDedup.checkBeforeSave (dedup overlay), then writes the lead via _saveLead and closes the modal.
notes: Duplicate of #leadSaveBtn (092). saveLead was the C-1 no-op bug (live-qa-2026-06-07) — verify it's in _NBD_CALL_ALLOWLIST.

label: First Name (input)
expected_behavior: Sets the lead's firstName; required (saveLead rejects empty name+address).
notes: Required for save.

label: Last Name (input)
expected_behavior: Sets the lead's lastName.

label: Address (autocomplete input)
expected_behavior: Sets the lead's address; required for save. Drives the #ac-lAddr autocomplete dropdown (place suggestions).
notes: Required for save; autocomplete suggestions are dynamically rendered into #ac-lAddr.

label: Phone (tel input)
expected_behavior: Sets the lead's phone; validated by saveLead. Same-phone match is a HIGH dedup trigger.
notes: HIGH-match dedup key (last 10 digits).

label: Email (input)
expected_behavior: Sets the lead's email; format-validated by saveLead before save.

label: Stage (select)
expected_behavior: Sets the lead's pipeline stage; grouped optgroups (Lead/Insurance/Cash/Finance/Warranty/Service/Contract/Job/Exit). Changing it triggers toggleInsuranceFields (shows job-detail block for post-contract stages).
notes: ~30 stage options; track optgroups filtered by job type.

label: Job Type (select)
expected_behavior: Sets jobType (insurance/cash/finance/warranty/service); on change toggleInsuranceFields shows/hides the insurance/finance/job detail blocks, sub-type+trades row, and filters the stage dropdown.
notes: Master toggle for conditional field blocks (078-088).

label: Sub-Type (select)
expected_behavior: Sets the lead's sub-type; options come from SUB_TYPES[jobType]. Row hidden until a job type is set (refreshSubTypeAndTrades).
notes: #lSubTypeRow is .dn until job type set.

label: Trades (multi-select chips)
expected_behavior: Each chip toggles its data-selected attribute (multi-select); selection read on save. Chips populated by refreshSubTypeAndTrades; row hidden until job type set.
notes: Dynamically-rendered chip toggles; representative element.

label: Source (select)
expected_behavior: Sets the lead's source (Door Knock / Storm Canvass / Referral / Online / Other).

label: Damage Type (select)
expected_behavior: Sets the lead's damageType (Roof/Siding Hail/Wind, Gutters, Full Exterior, Fire, Water, Other); drives the card damage chip.

label: Claim Status (select)
expected_behavior: Sets the lead's claim status (No Claim / Filed / Adjuster Scheduled / Approved / Supplementing / Paid Out / Denied); drives the card claim tag.

label: Job Value ($) (number input)
expected_behavior: Sets the lead's job value; drives the card value badge and pipeline-value stat.

label: Follow-Up Date (date input)
expected_behavior: Sets the lead's follow-up date; drives follow-up-due alerts and the 'Due' card tag.

label: Insurance Carrier (input)
expected_behavior: Sets the lead's insurance carrier (free text); drives the card carrier chip.

selector: #insuranceFieldsBlock inputs (Claim Number / Filed By / Policy / Date of Loss / Estimate Amt / Deductible / Supplement Status / Scope of Work)
label: Insurance Claim Details (block)
expected_behavior: Eight fields (#lClaimNumber, #lClaimFiledBy, #lPolicyNumber, #lDateOfLoss, #lEstimateAmount, #lDeductible, #lSupplementStatus, #lScopeOfWork) feed AOB/inspection/supplement docs. Block shown only when jobType=insurance (toggleInsuranceFields).
source_ref: dashboard.html:11673-11711 (block hidden default; shown by toggleInsuranceFields:113)
notes: 8 inputs/selects in one conditional block. claimNumber is a gate required-field for claim_filed stage.

selector: #financeFieldsBlock inputs (Finance Company / Loan Amount / Loan Status / Pre-Qual Link)
label: Financing Details (block)
expected_behavior: Four fields (#lFinanceCompany, #lLoanAmount, #lLoanStatus, #lPreQualLink) capture financing data. Block shown only when jobType=finance.
notes: 4 fields in one conditional block.

label: Job Details (block)
expected_behavior: Two fields (#lScheduledDate, #lCrew) capture install scheduling. Block shown only when stage is post-contract (job_created..closed) per toggleInsuranceFields.
notes: 2 fields; shown only for job/install stages.

label: 🏠 Pull Property Intel
expected_behavior: pullIntelForModal fetches property intel for the entered address and renders it into #modalIntelResult (window._modalIntel) for save.

label: Notes (textarea)
expected_behavior: Free-text notes (roof age, damage, adjuster, supplements) saved on the lead.

label: Next actions (context buttons)
expected_behavior: renderNextActionsPanel populates STAGE_ACTIONS-driven buttons (e.g. send estimate, schedule adjuster) for the lead's current stage. Shown only when editing an existing lead.
notes: display:none on Add; populated dynamically per stage on Edit. Some actions may be send/esign — inspect per stage before driving.

label: Save Lead (bottom button)
expected_behavior: saveLead — same validate→dedup→_saveLead→close flow as the top-bar Save (#leadModalSave).
notes: Duplicate Save affordance (with #leadModalSave 067).

label: Existing-lead match button (dedup)
expected_behavior: On Save with duplicate matches, the dedup overlay lists matches (HIGH=same phone/address). Clicking a match returns {proceed:false, openLeadId} — abandons the new lead and opens the existing one.
notes: Conditional reveal — only when a HIGH/MEDIUM match exists. Repeats per match.

label: Create anyway (dedup override)
expected_behavior: Returns {proceed:true, duplicateOf:<matchId>} so saveLead proceeds and creates the lead anyway, stamping duplicateOf for audit. This is the HIGH-MATCH override path.
notes: The HIGH-MATCH 'create anyway' override called out in surface scope.

label: Cancel (dedup)
expected_behavior: Returns {proceed:false} — closes the dedup overlay and aborts the save, leaving the lead modal open.

label: Move to Deleted / Cancel (delete confirm)
expected_behavior: confirmDeleteLead soft-deletes the lead (moves to Deleted drawer); cancelDeleteConfirm dismisses the confirm modal without deleting.
notes: DANGER: delete confirm boundary for the card delete path (065).

label: ← Back to Pipeline
expected_behavior: goTo target=crm navigates back to the kanban pipeline view.
notes: Prospects page.

label: 🚪 D2D Tracker
expected_behavior: goTo target=d2d navigates to the Door-to-Door tracker.
notes: Off-surface destination.

label: ＋ New Knock
expected_behavior: openD2DOrGo opens the D2D quick-knock capture (or navigates to D2D if not loaded) to add a new prospect knock.

label: Prospect stats strip (clickable buckets)
expected_behavior: Prospects.render() populates clickable stat tiles that filter the prospect board by bucket (e.g. interested, callback, follow-up). Dynamically rendered.
notes: JS-rendered; representative tile.

label: Prospect filters + view toggle (kanban/list)
expected_behavior: Prospects.render() populates filter controls and a kanban/list view toggle that re-renders #prospects-board accordingly.
notes: JS-rendered filter/toggle cluster.

label: Prospect card / Promote to customer
expected_behavior: Prospects.render() draws prospect cards with a Promote action that calls promoteProspect(id) — flips isProspect=false and graduates it into the kanban pipeline (the convert lead->job entry point from Prospects).
notes: Promote = prospect→customer conversion. Repeats per prospect card.

label: Stale-prospect cleanup banner / Conversion analytics (collapsible)
expected_behavior: Prospects.render() auto-shows a 60d+ stale-cleanup nudge (with a cleanup action) and a collapsible conversion-analytics panel.
notes: Banner conditional on stale prospects; analytics collapsible.

selector: #crmDiagnostic buttons (loadSampleData / retryLoadLeads / testFirestoreRules / copyDebugInfo / Dismiss / debugConsole toggle)
label: CRM Diagnostic panel actions
expected_behavior: Shown only when loadLeads fails. Buttons: load sample data, retryLoadLeads (re-fetch), testFirestoreRules (rules probe), copyDebugInfo (clipboard), toggle debug console, and hideEl Dismiss.
notes: Error-state-only panel; 6 controls grouped.
